title: Khorramābād Heat Wave
lead: Khorramābād is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.89. Temperatures are extremely high, exceeding normal levels.
body:
The current heat wave in Khorramābād has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature anomaly is significantly high, with a Z-Score of +3.89, indicating a rare and extreme event. 
 The low humidity of 10% and moderate wind speed of 16.7 km/h are exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
